recommendations:
Shane de Wit MAICD MBA

I have worked with Robbie over several years during my time as General Manager Retail and Car Parking and Manager Commercial Innovation at Melbourne Airport.  Robbie is an accomplished commercially focused leader.  His team is close knit, focused on delivering results and always speak highly of their leader.  His negotiation style is collaborative and he always seeks win/win/win outcomes for our businesses and our customers.  Robbie is an innovative and creative thinker, who challenges the status quo.  The qualities I appreciate most about Robbie are integrity, trustworthiness and the fact that he always does what he says he will do.

Brad Thompson

Robbie was the executive sponsor for Travelex who hired my company to create an Inside Sales Team whose mission was to acquire new customers requiring FX Services within in the United States and Puerto Rico. Robbie proved to be a valuable business partner and an effective executive leader.  In creating this successful partnerhip, Robbie was able to create an effective management system, mentor and develop an unproven sales force and drive positive change within both of our organizations.  Robbie created a new sales process which incorporated Key Performance Indicators (KPIs), Electronic Direct Marketing (EDM) and pipleline management not seen in either organization.  The process accelerated the sales effectiveness of the inside sales team.  So much so, in less than a year the team was able to generate revenue equaling a long tenured field sales force. Robbie's key attributes of intelligence, tenacity and humility made our business partnership successful.

Shane de Wit   MBA GAICD

I have worked with Robbie over several years during my time as General Manager Retail and Car Parking and Manager Commercial Innovation at Melbourne Airport.  Robbie is an accomplished commercially focused leader.  His team is close knit, focused on delivering results and always speak highly of their leader.  His negotiation style is collaborative and he always seeks win/win/win outcomes for our businesses and our customers.  Robbie is an innovative and creative thinker, who challenges the status quo.  The qualities I appreciate most about Robbie are integrity, trustworthiness and the fact that he always does what he says he will do.
